User.title: User Profile
User.description: Stores user statistics and sharing information.

uid.description: Unique user ID from Firebase Auth.

shareCode.description: Unique code for friend challenges (e.g., GYM-XXXX).

completedSessions.description: Total number of completed workout sessions.

currentStreak.description: Current consecutive days of working out.

lastWorkoutDate.description: The date of the last workout.

Workout.title: Workout Session
Workout.description: Stores details of a planned or completed workout session.

uid.description: User ID who owns this workout.

date.description: The scheduled date of the workout.

workoutName.description: Name of the workout (e.g., Push Day).

exercises.description: List of exercises in this session.

dateCompleted.description: The date when the workout was completed.
